PROJECT 04

SAVEETHA
System.

Project Type Branding / Garments
Duration 3 Weeks
Focus Area Visual Layout
Deliverables Identity / Presentation

The Challenge

SAVEETHA required a clean and structured presentation layout that balanced institutional authority with modern, forward-thinking visual identity.

The Solution

We designed a customized presentation system, translating their brand parameters and garment details into structured, bold visual layouts built to communicate impact instantly.
